I'm designing a financial simulation game where the main goal is to earn as much as possible at the end of the year. The player will start to build a company from scratch and it is up to him which type of business he will venture into. Ensure to be as realistic as possible by basing the provisions on real-life investment situations in the US. Use also the names of businesses in the US when referring to the industry. Example: Walmart for Supermarket. Through the game, the player should experience what it's like to invest his inheritance in the business he chose and encourage him to pursue this investment outside the cyber world. Remember that this is for entertainment purposes only.
